name: d3rac-tron-contracts
description: Test suite for D3R-AC's TRON contracts (D3RACToken, IdentityRegistry, DisbursementController, MultiSigAdmin, D3RACHub, RiskRegistry, FundingRequestRegistry). Logic tests only -- see hardhat.config.js for why Hardhat is used here instead of TronBox, and docs/deployment-guide.md for actual TRON deployment.
